name: Python (Qt/GUI)
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libgl1 libegl1 libegl-mesa0 libxcb-xinerama0 libxcb-icccm4 libxcb-image0 libxcb-keysyms1 libxcb-randr0 libxcb-render-util0 libxcb-xkb1 libxkbcommon-x11-0 libxcb-shape0 libxcb-cursor0 libdbus-1-3 && pip install uv && (uv sync --locked 2>/dev/null || uv pip install --system -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || true)
